definition: A specific pre-market trading model for US equity index futures. Uses the 90-minute pre-market range (8:00-9:30 AM NY) as the accumulation phase, then trades the sweep + reversal at market open.
composes: liquidity_sweep (pre-market high/low get swept at open)

setup.step_1: Mark 90-min pre-market range high/low (8:00-9:30 AM NY)
setup.step_2: At 9:30 open, watch for sweep of pre-market high OR low
setup.step_3: After sweep, wait for displacement + FVG in opposite direction
setup.step_4: Enter retracement into FVG. SL beyond pre-market sweep extreme.

connection_to_PO3: Venom IS PO3 applied to the specific 8:00-10:30 AM window with pre-market as the accumulation range.
